rows.Product: Reques√≥n Cheese ‚ÄĒ 1 lb plastic clamshell packages, repacked at retail from "Clover Hill Dairy Requeson Cheese" 18 lb bulk containers (sell-by 2026-06-14, batch #2AA051526). Sold at retail locations in New York from 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-28. Labeling and coding vary by store of purchase.
rows.Reason: NY State Department of Agriculture & Markets Food Inspectors sampled the 18 lb bulk "Clover Hill Dairy Requeson Cheese" container (sell-by 2026-06-14, batch #2AA051526) at retail. NY Food Laboratory analysis confirmed Listeria monocytogenes contamination. Nelson & Isa Lacteos LLC of Bayshore, NY voluntarily initiated recall of 1 lb clamshell packages repacked from the contaminated bulk container.
rows.Notes: Company Announcement and FDA Publish Date both 2026-06-05. Connected to the broader multi-state Clover Hill Dairy Listeria outbreak (existing R36 CDC outbreak investigation + R24 outbreak index for soft-cheese-06-26). Nelson & Isa Lacteos is the retail repacker ‚ÄĒ they did NOT manufacture the cheese; they repacked Clover Hill Dairy 18 lb bulk containers into 1 lb clamshells at their NY retail. No illnesses reported in this firm's specific distribution (outbreak=0 for this row; the CDC outbreak rows carry the outbreak=1 flag). Manual operator add 2026-06-09. fda_listing.py title-only filter missed this URL ‚ÄĒ slug ends in "possible-health-risk" with no pathogen keyword (same fail pattern as Champion Foods, Prime Herring, Mogo, Total Nutrition, SKS Copack ‚ÄĒ sixth confirmed instance).

rows.Product: Dried Herring Fish ‚ÄĒ Item #AF4110, Lot Code 26020, expiration 2028-12-06, 7 oz (198 g) clear plastic packaging with blue trim. 69 cases recalled. Manufactured in Vietnam; imported. Distributed to Asian grocery stores in AZ, CA, FL, HI, IL, KS, LA, MD, MO, NC, NH, NV, NY, OK, PA, TX, UT (17 states).
rows.Reason: Voluntary recall ‚ÄĒ product was not adequately eviscerated. Sale of uneviscerated fish is prohibited under New York State Agriculture and Markets regulations because Clostridium botulinum spores are concentrated in viscera. Issue identified during routine NY DAM regulatory testing. No illnesses reported to date.
rows.Notes: Company Announcement 2026-06-02; FDA Publish 2026-06-04. Origin Vietnam (imported product). Sister recall to R761 Prime Food Processing Dried Croaker Fish (2026-02-05) ‚ÄĒ same firm, recurring uneviscerated-fish issue. Manual operator add 2026-06-04 ‚ÄĒ fda_listing.py title-only filter would have missed this URL (slug contains "safety-warning" not pathogen keyword; same failure pattern as Champion Foods, Mogo, Total Nutrition, SKS Copack).
